title: Initial values in struct/union members
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

What would you like added/supported?

```
./test_regress/t/t_struct_unpacked_init.py

%Error-UNSUPPORTED: t/t_struct_unpacked_init.v:12:24: Unsupported: Initial values in struct/union members
                                                    : ... note: In instance 't'
   12 |       bit [3:0] m_lo = P;
      |                        ^
```
